Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion Of Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL LAW OF THE SOLUKI & SAVOY LLP, TEL. NO. 1-213-814-4940 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KEVIN J. HERMANSON OF THE LAW OFFICE OF LORI R. MAYFIELD, TEL. NO. 1-510-457-9931 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS NICOLE DEWALD, RACHAEL CORNELL AND DECOR BAR, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication - Motion for summary judgment is denied in its entirety. Defendant has not shifted the burden on causation. Summary Adjudication on the 3rd cause of action for Negligent Hiring is Granted as well as the other 3 causes of action which are all the same. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(302/HEK)
